Methodology: Antenna cumulative voluntary resubscription points: 10% by month 1, 23% by month 3, 37% by month 9, 41% by month 12. Monthly rates are linearly interpolated between observed cumulative points.
Recurly reports average decline-management efficiency of 69.4%. Monthly curve is derived to sum to 69.4% over 6 months: [35.0%, 15.0%, 9.0%, 5.0%, 3.0%, 2.4%].
No arbitrary repeat multipliers are used in v3. Any churn event re-enters the appropriate future reactivation pool under the same sourced/derived curve rules.
ChartMogul ARR / ARPA churn benchmarks supply base logo and revenue churn context.
High Alpha / OpenView provide SaaS expansion / growth composition context.
KeyBanc / Sapphire provide SaaS gross margin context.
Benchmark studies provide new-customer CAC ratio framing.
